See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 21321 => 'Algiers', 21327 => 'Chlef', 21329 => 'Ghardaia/Illizi/Tamanrasset', 21331 => 'Constantine', 21332 => 'El Oued', 21333 => 'Batna/Beskra', 21334 => 'Béjaïa/Jijel', 21335 => 'Bordj Bou Arreridj', 21337 => 'Tebessa', 21338 => 'Annaba/Skikda', 21341 => 'Oran', 21343 => 'Tlemcen', 21344 => 'Blida', 21349 => 'Adrar/Béchar/Tindouf', ];
